svg.text: IDLE: on RequestPickPlace edge, latch id and start
WAIT_CAMERA_CLEAR: arrived clear of the frame
WAIT_FOR_VISION: signal ready; targets already written
LOAD_TARGETS: latch Pick/Drop angles to working regs
MOVE_ABOVE_PICK: command move to the pick pose
VACUUM_ON: pull vacuum, start settle timer
MOVE_ABOVE_DROP: command move to the drop pose
VACUUM_OFF_BLOWOFF: release + blow off, start timer
COMPLETE_JOB: acknowledge id, set Done, back to idle
FAULT: hold; recover on Reset edge when safe
Any state: Abort or unsafe -> FAULT
